title: NLP-007-define-sentiment-analysis-and-discuss-its-applications.
author: AI 面试题库
abstract:
NLP-007 Define sentiment analysis and discuss its applications.

 7. Define sentiment analysis and discuss its applications.
答案要点:
- 定义: 从文本中识别情感倾向（正面/负面/中性）或具体情绪
- 层级:
  - Document-level
  - Sentence-level
  - Aspect-based (细粒度)
- 方法:
  - 规则：Lexicon-based (VADER, TextBlob)
  - ML：Naive Bayes, SVM
  - DL：LSTM, BERT
- 应用:
  - Brand Monitoring
  - Customer Feedback Analysis
  - Stock Market Prediction
  - Political Opinion Tracking
  - Mental Health Detection

质量评分: 9...

sections.title: 7. Define sentiment analysis and discuss its applications.
sections.content:
**答案要点:**
- **定义**: 从文本中识别情感倾向（正面/负面/中性）或具体情绪
- **层级**:
  - Document-level
  - Sentence-level
  - Aspect-based (细粒度)
- **方法**:
  - 规则：Lexicon-based (VADER, TextBlob)
  - ML：Naive Bayes, SVM
  - DL：LSTM, BERT
- **应用**:

  - Customer Feedback Analysis
  - Stock Market Prediction
  - Political Opinion Tracking
